column1: # COCA master lexicon (ngrams.info coca_lexicon.txt, format #3), compacted.
# word<TAB>lemma<TAB>pos<TAB>rank — pos: n noun v verb b be/aux j adj r adverb i prep.
# rank = COCA frequency rank of the surface form (1=most frequent). Frequency is an
# axis ORTHOGONAL to PoS (salience/routing priority, not grammatical role).
